cases.name: bplist_ascii_string_roundtrip
cases.description: ASCII root string writes as binary plist and reads back as the same immutable string value.

cases.name: bplist_unicode_string_roundtrip
cases.description: Non-ASCII root string writes as binary plist and reads back through the UTF-16 string path.

cases.name: bplist_mixed_array_roundtrip
cases.description: Mixed scalar array writes and reads back with the same supported element semantics.

cases.name: bplist_string_key_dictionary_roundtrip
cases.description: String-key dictionary writes and reads back with the same supported key/value semantics.

cases.name: bplist_non_string_dictionary_key_write_rejected
cases.description: Binary-plist writing rejects dictionaries with non-string keys safely.

cases.name: bplist_invalid_header_rejected
cases.description: Binary-plist reading rejects an invalid header safely.

cases.name: bplist_truncated_trailer_rejected
cases.description: Binary-plist reading rejects truncated trailer data safely.
